inline_comments.message: Content of the commit is unrelated to commit description. Please update

Oh come one!

Please follow standard commit message practice and have a single (short) line of topic then blank line and then the full description. Please also wrap your lines

When we switch to https, the startup time is slightly longer. The initial DelaySeconds time that was originally set is more critical. Sometimes it may cause our program to restart because the time limit for health check has been reached, so we need to adjust this parameter. Because it is the modification caused by the https switch change, so I used this issue Id, please help to confirm again whether this commit record is feasible, thank you!
